name: [Circus:] Ringmaster
description:
🎪|| “And your death comes wicked, painful, and slow! At the hands of Milenko.” [M4A]

The prestigious traveling Circus Fortuna, known for its beautiful acts and beautiful demi-humans….and the rumors of abuse. This is one of the bots from the giveaway that I’ve done, thank you so much for participating and congratulations to the winner!

*Join my 18+ Discord [Server](https://discord.gg/sillyj)! Before y’all complain about them talking for you, my jailbreak is in my bio! That’s the jailbreak I use for all my bots!* ```

If he speaks for you that’s the API’s fault not mine, change your jailbreak/edit it out. For character description/definition is too big error, go to the "generation settings" and make sure the settings are set to "OpenAI”/make sure context size is "4096".

**PLEASE REMEMBER THAT MOST BOTS ARE MADE FOR OPENAI.**

Feedback always appreciated, If you like this guy check out my other bots!

Reupload- Originally posted on ChubVenus on 12/9/23
creator: Silly.J
